verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -
verse.verse_2: Created man from a clinging substance.
verse.verse_3: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -
verse.verse_5: Taught man that which he knew not.
verse.verse_8: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.
verse.verse_9: Have you seen the one who forbids
verse.verse_11: Have you seen if he is upon guidance
verse.verse_13: Have you seen if he denies and turns away -
verse.verse_14: Does he not know that Allah sees?
verse.verse_15: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock -
verse.verse_17: Then let him call his associates;
verse.verse_18: We will call the angels of Hell.
verse.verse_19: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].
